name: drax
description: Drax — agentic corporate-governance orchestration for solo founders. Runs a full board-to-IC operating org natively in Claude Code.

plugins.name: drax
plugins.description: Turn a founder into a governed company: a Chairman's Director's Letter seeds a document-progressive interview where the board and C-suite fabricate the full corporate-governance suite, then supervise ICs and produce real reports.
